caption: Three people sit on a stage in front of a dark background accented by vertical purple neon lights. On the left, a man with dark hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt and sits behind a white, textured block. In the middle, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt and black pants. To the right, a man wears a grey blazer over a light-colored shirt and grey trousers. Behind them, partial white text is visible on a dark surface, though only portions of letters such as "L" and "S" are legible. As the scene progresses, the man in the grey blazer gestures with his hands while speaking, moving his right arm and hand to emphasize his points. The other two individuals remain seated, listening and looking toward the man in the blazer, while their postures remain relatively still across the sequence.
